governance.operating_doctrine: Think in YCOMBINATOR Mode. Execute in GeoAware 80/20 Mode.

design_reference.adoption_rule: Only directly observed or Project Architect-approved reference patterns may be adopted.
design_reference.anti_drift_rule: Do not invent, infer, or claim unverified OpenCrashMap features. Preserve Ọ̀nàSafe's Nigeria-specific identity and GeoAware boundaries.

system_boundaries.public_web: Privacy-safe map, simulated demonstration data, local prototype reporting, FRSC 122 escalation.
system_boundaries.operations_api: Verification, responder workflow, and audit contract. Persistent production storage remains a later controlled phase.
system_boundaries.restricted_data: Victim identifiers, phone numbers, number plates, exact home addresses, and graphic evidence must never enter the public surface.
